sources.title: Phase 4 source: minimal agent loop
sources.summary: Minimal agent loop and evidence requirements for AI builders.

history_items.title: Add retrieval over local memory
history_items.reason: Memory is written after ticket runs but is not yet indexed or cited by future planning.

history_items.title: Add regression guard for code_task changes
Improve test coverage for LLM backlog and runtime modules
history_items.reason: Changed files included `tests/test_llm_backlog.py` and `tests/test_llm_runtime.py` but the execution was blocked before tests ran. Ensure these tests are robust and cover edge cases.

history_items.title: Add pre-flight check for external execution environment
history_items.reason: To prevent future blockages, implement a check that ensures ARIADNE_ENABLE_EXTERNAL_EXECUTION is set before attempting external tasks.

history_items.title: Fix failing tests in test_cli.py
history_items.reason: Modified tests in test_cli.py likely cause build failures; ensure all tests pass before proceeding with JSON export implementation.

history_items.title: Migrate content from .mini-code-agent/ to allowed project paths
history_items.reason: .mini-code-agent/ directory was created outside allowed paths, causing a scope violation block.

history_items.title: Implement CLI command to inspect past runs
history_items.reason: Changed files include run.json and trajectory.jsonl; an inspect command would allow users to review run history.

history_items.title: Implement agent loop with LLM integration
history_items.reason: Current CLI boots but does not invoke the LLM or perform code tasks; the core agent functionality is missing.

history_items.title: Add CLI command to review past runs
history_items.reason: Run logs are generated but users have no way to inspect them via the CLI; this aligns with product goal of inspectable evidence.

history_items.title: Implement a single‑iteration agent loop that uses the CLI to perform a concrete code task
history_items.reason: The CLI is bootstrapped but not yet exercised for any real agent behavior. Building an end‑to‑end walk demonstrates product value and generates real trajectory evidence for review.

history_items.title: Implement ask_user interaction module
history_items.reason: The build packet's reference inputs mention an 'ask_user' component as part of the CLI-first agent shape. This module is needed to handle interactive prompts from the agent, a core product requirement.

history_items.title: Implement buddy companion mood tracking and storage
history_items.reason: The initial plan references modules for buddy mood and storage (test_buddy_mood.py, test_buddy_storage.py). These are necessary to deliver the companion feature set outlined in the build packet.

history_items.title: Implement `mini-code-agent runs` command to list and inspect past runs
history_items.reason: Multiple run files are generated; providing a way to review them from CLI adds product value.

history_items.title: Implement core agent loop with LLM integration
history_items.reason: The current codebase only provides a CLI scaffold. To function as a code agent, the main loop that orchestrates planning, execution, and LLM calls must be implemented.

history_items.title: Connect CLI agent to Ariadne Web Workbench
history_items.reason: Acceptance criteria for MCA-001 requires the implementation to be reachable from the Web Workbench product path. This ensures the agent can be triggered and monitored via the web interface.

history_items.title: Add TUI interface for interactive agent use
history_items.reason: Build tasks referenced a TUI entry point (`cc-mini = 'tui.app:main'`). A terminal UI would provide a richer interactive experience for builders working directly in the terminal.

history_items.title: Enhance session persistence and review capabilities
history_items.reason: While run logs are generated, the persistence system could be improved for better inspection, replay, and analysis of agent trajectories.

history_items.title: Add CLI command to list and inspect past runs
history_items.reason: The agent generates run evidence in `.mini-code-agent/runs/`, but there is currently no built-in way to quickly browse these runs from the CLI. A `list` and `show` command would improve inspectability and user experience.
